description: Select all temporal types and verify correct Rust type mappings

rust-sqlx.row_struct:
#[derive(Debug, sqlx::FromRow)]
pub struct GetTemporalDataRow {
    pub id: i32,
    pub d: chrono::NaiveDate,
    pub t: chrono::NaiveTime,
    pub tz: sqlx::postgres::types::PgTimeTz,
    pub ts: chrono::NaiveDateTime,
    pub tstz: chrono::DateTime<chrono::Utc>,
    pub dur: sqlx::postgres::types::PgInterval,
}

columns.name: tz
columns.note: TIMETZ maps to PgTimeTz (time + UTC offset), not NaiveTime

name: all_temporal_types
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE temporal_data (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, d DATE NOT NULL, t TIME NOT NULL, tz TIMETZ NOT NULL, ts TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, tstz TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, dur INTERVAL NOT NULL);
